Revenue grew from 100 in FY2023 to 106.8 in TTM; profit grew from 22 in FY2023 to 23.5 in TTM.
TAQA named a new chairman and confirmed a Dh5 billion dividend payout on 2026-03-13.

Allowed-return reset, fuel-cost pass-through timing, and capex execution.
